name: @mentora/desktop
description: Mentora Electron thin desktop host (main + preload).

scripts.dev: cross-env MENTORA_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 concurrently -k -n bundle,electron "tsup --watch" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 dist/main/index.cjs dist/preload/index.cjs && cross-env MENTORA_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 nodemon --delay 300ms --watch dist/main/index.cjs --watch dist/preload/index.cjs -e cjs --exec \"electron .\""
